title: Aneeruth Suresh joins Cholayil as Head - Legal
description: Aneeruth Suresh has joined Cholayil Private Limited as Head - Legal.Suresh is a 2015 graduate of Sri Venkateswara University. He is also a member of The Institute of Company Secretaries of India.With over 13 years of experience as an in-house counsel, Suresh specializes in Management, Corporate Laws and Contractual Agreements.At Cholayil, he will be leading the legal and compliance function, providing strategic counsel to business leadership on corporate governance, commercial transactions, regu
